prompt: Parse the AXI DMA spec and give me a structured DV summary. Spec file: axi_dma_spec.md. Project: axi_dma.

assertions.text: dv_spec_summary.md and dv_spec_summary.json are both created
Both clock domains (aclk and pclk) captured
assertions.evidence: 2 clock domains extracted: aclk 100-200 MHz and pclk 50-100 MHz

assertions.text: Both interfaces (AXI4 Master and APB Slave) listed with signals
assertions.evidence: 3 interfaces with 34 total signals: AXI4 Master (23), APB Slave (9), Interrupt (2)
AXI4 ARM IHI0022 and APB v2.0 both listed

assertions.text: Known constraints include word-alignment and single-outstanding-transaction
assertions.evidence: 7 known constraints listed; both constraints confirmed present

assertions.text: JSON is valid and matches defined schema structure
assertions.evidence: Valid JSON with all required top-level keys; 9 NEEDS_REVIEW items flagged for spec gaps (register map missing, CDC strategy undefined)
